summary: Complete frontend testing of Aetheron AI Technologies premium website - all core features working properly including loading screen, hero section with Spline 3D, all sections, animations, and interactions
passed_tests: Loading screen appears with animated progress bar (0-100%)
Loading screen transitions properly to main content after ~3 seconds
Hero section displays with Spline 3D iframe background
Hero section shows animated typography 'Engineering Intelligent Machines. Redefining Industrial Reality.'
Hero section welcome text and subtext visible
Hero CTA button 'Explore AetherBuilt' is clickable and scrolls to project section
About section shows 'We don't build apps, We build intelligent infrastructure' text with image
About section displays stats (99.9% Uptime, 50ms Latency, 24/7 Monitoring)
Project showcase displays 'AETHERBUILT' with proper typography
Project showcase shows glass panels with animated numbers: 1,247 machines online, 94% CPU efficiency, 3 alerts today, 12K/hr throughput
Project 'Launch Demo' button is clickable
Features section shows all 6 feature cards with proper icons and descriptions
Feature cards: Real-Time Machine Monitoring, Predictive AI Analytics, Industrial Automation Layer, Smart Dashboard Control, Performance Optimization, Enterprise Security
Immersive section displays 'Built for Industrial Evolution.' text with parallax background
Immersive section shows 'POWERING THE FUTURE OF MANUFACTURING' subtitle
Footer displays company name 'Aetheron AI Technologies Pvt Ltd'
Footer email link 'contact@aetheron.ai' is clickable
Footer LinkedIn link is clickable
Footer copyright information present
Custom cursor with silver glowing ring appears on desktop
Custom cursor responds to hover states on interactive elements
Scroll functionality works smoothly between all sections
Scroll indicator 'SCROLL' with chevron arrow visible in hero section
All sections properly display with framer-motion animations
Glass panels and UI elements render correctly with backdrop blur effects
Typography animations work with letter-by-letter reveals
Gradient backgrounds and metallic text effects display properly
